note: BRAIN layer — Day 12 value delivery queue. THREE INTERESTED leads in active pipeline (leads 3, 22, 1). CRITICAL: Claire (lead 3) call outcome must be confirmed by HANDS first thing. Proposal nudge may be due today. Rob (lead 22) and Tom (lead 1) are post-nudge — check IMAP for responses. Pipeline value estimate: £800-1,200.

items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online booking system — self-reported lost customers

option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — customers pay per-booking fee. Zero monthly cost objection.

if_committed_tuesday.check: Is there a confirmation email or invoice from Tuesday post-call?
if_committed_tuesday.action: Lead 3 → CONVERTED. Log £350 revenue. Delivery in progress. Write CHANGELOG.md note — first conversion is a milestone.
if_committed_tuesday.invoice_due: 50% deposit should have been received by now — check.

if_deferred_tuesday.check: Was proposal PDF sent Tuesday post-call? Has Claire responded?
if_deferred_tuesday.action: If no response to proposal PDF: send 2-line nudge TODAY (Thursday). HANDS: send — 'Claire — happy to walk through anything in the proposal if it helps. Just reply and I'll pick up from there.' Do NOT resend the full proposal. One nudge only.
if_deferred_tuesday.nudge_due: TODAY 2026-04-09 — do not delay past EOD

if_declined_tuesday.check: Did she say no on the call?
if_declined_tuesday.action: Mark lead 3 LOST. Log in CRM. No further contact unless she re-initiates.
if_declined_tuesday.note: Rare outcome given the call booking — but plan for it.

if_call_not_confirmed.action: HANDS: check calendar and sent items. If call was missed (her or your side), reach out with a 2-line reschedule offer: 'Claire — sorry we missed each other Tuesday. Would a call Thursday afternoon or Friday morning work?' Keep it light.

items.reply_summary: Asked whether SSL/mobile can be bundled into full redesign. 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — upsell signal.

option_b.name: Full Redesign Bundle
option_b.scope: New design + SSL + mobile + contact form + portfolio gallery

option_c.name: Redesign + Ongoing SEO
option_c.scope: Option B + monthly local SEO ('print shop Sowerby Bridge')

if_replied_to_nudge.check: Did Rob reply to Tuesday nudge asking for scope doc or to book a call?
if_replied_to_nudge.action: If he asked for the scope doc: send it today (Options A, B, C clearly laid out on one page). If he asked to talk: offer 15-min call Thursday afternoon or Friday morning. Confirm immediately.
if_replied_to_nudge.note: His question was commercial, not cost-driven. The scope doc removes friction without reducing price.

if_still_silent.action: Do not chase again this week. Wait until Monday 2026-04-13. If still no reply Monday, one final nudge: 'Rob — happy to leave it here if the timing isn't right — just wanted to make sure my note didn't get buried.' Then close the loop.
if_still_silent.note: 2 days since nudge is not long. Rob is likely busy — over-chasing will kill a warm lead.

items.new_pain_point_discovered: No online quote form — customers told to ring instead

if_replied_today.check: Did Tom reply to Wednesday nudge or book a call?
if_replied_today.action: Confirm call slot Thursday afternoon or Friday. NOT Monday (leave open), NOT Tuesday. Reply immediately — trades people move quickly when they decide.
if_replied_today.call_prep: Keep it simple: agree spec (quote form, 3-4 fields), confirm price (£100-150 one-off), confirm timeline (2-3 days). No need for a full proposal — this is a simple job.

if_still_silent.check: No response to Wednesday nudge yet?
if_still_silent.action: Only nudged 12-24 hours ago — wait. Do not chase again today. If silent by Monday 2026-04-13, assess whether to send a final light touch or close the loop.
if_still_silent.note: Tom acknowledged the pain and asked for pricing — genuine interest. Nudges have a 24-48hr response window for trades.

conversion_probability.lead_3_claire: HIGH — self-identified pain, confirmed call, responded to proposal
conversion_probability.lead_22_rob: MEDIUM-HIGH — buyer's question, bundling intent, two nudges in
conversion_probability.lead_1_tom: MEDIUM — simple job, right price, two nudges in

summary.gdpr_note: All three leads replied voluntarily to cold outreach — legitimate interest basis confirmed. Continued contact is engaged communication. Interactions logged in audit_log.
summary.notes: HANDS: priority order this morning is (1) confirm Claire call outcome and act accordingly, (2) check Rob IMAP, (3) check Tom IMAP, then proceed to the 7 cold follow-ups.
